meta.siteDescription: Stay gentle, stay moving — apps that adapt to your energy
meta.gentledoDescription: Work with your energy, not against it. Guilt-free productivity.
meta.gentlefastDescription: Gentle intermittent fasting — no guilt, just momentum.

main.heroDescription: Apps that adapt to your energy
main.valueNoRedDesc: Soft tones for warnings and overdue items
main.valueMomentumDesc: One day off doesn't reset your progress
main.valueEnergyDesc: Adapt daily to how you actually feel
main.valueFreshStartDesc: Tidy up overdue tasks without guilt
main.aboutDescription: Productivity apps should help you, not burden you. GentleLab builds apps that respect your energy and condition.

gentledo.heroDescription: Work with your energy, not against it. Guilt-free productivity.
gentledo.betaDescription: Free download on the iOS App Store. Android is currently in closed beta — join via Google Play. No ads, no account required, all data stays on your device.
gentledo.energyDescription: Begin each morning with a simple energy check-in. See the right tasks for your condition.
gentledo.momentumDescription: No streak counters. Momentum scores decrease slowly when you rest — so taking a break doesn't reset your progress.
gentledo.focusDescription: Deep work on a single task with Focus Mode.
gentledo.freshStartDescription: Batch-clean overdue tasks in one tap. Fresh Start lets you begin again — guilt-free.
gentledo.featureTimelineDesc: See your day on a 24-hour timeline
gentledo.featureSubtaskDesc: Break big tasks into manageable pieces
gentledo.featureDragDropDesc: Place tasks directly on the timeline
gentledo.featureDarkModeDesc: Easy on the eyes dark theme
gentledo.localTitle: Your data stays on your device
gentledo.localDescription: No account needed — just start. All data stays on your device.
gentledo.ctaDescription: Free on iOS · Android closed beta in progress. No ads. No red. Your data stays on your device.

gentlefast.heroDescription: No guilt, just momentum. A fasting tracker that adapts to your energy.
gentlefast.feature1Desc: Recommends 16:8, 18:6, or 20:4 based on your condition
gentlefast.feature3Desc: It's okay to break your fast. Just start again.
gentlefast.sharedDna: Built on GentleDo's core — Momentum, Energy Check-in, Fresh Start

gentlestudy.heroDescription: No burnout. Subject recommendations matched to your condition.
gentlestudy.feature1Desc: Review, problem-solving, or new concepts based on your energy
gentlestudy.feature2Desc: 25/5, 50/10, or free mode for focused study
gentlestudy.feature3Desc: Track days until exams with study progress
gentlestudy.sharedDna: Built on GentleDo's core — Momentum, Energy Check-in, Fresh Start
